item.description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

media:content.media:title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war
media:content.media:description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

item.title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war

item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio toured India’s famed Taj Mahal during a four-day visit at a critical time for U.S.-India relations. After bilateral talks with India’s external affairs minister, Rubio expressed optimism about future trade ties between the two countries, which were strained by President Trump’s tariff policies.

media:content.media:title: Rubio tours India’s famed Taj Mahal amid strained trade relations
media:content.media:description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio toured India’s famed Taj Mahal during a four-day visit at a critical time for U.S.-India relations. After bilateral talks with India’s external affairs minister, Rubio expressed optimism about future trade ties between the two countries, which were strained by President Trump’s tariff policies.

item.title: Rubio tours India’s famed Taj Mahal amid strained trade relations

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Jane C. Timm
item.description: A three-judge panel on Tuesday blocked a Republican-drawn congressional map in Alabama from going into effect, writing that the district lines “intentionally discriminated based on race in violation of the Constitution.”“We cannot see our way clear to requiring Alabamians to cast their votes in the 2026 elections under a districting plan tainted by intentional race-based discrimination,” the panel of federal judges wrote.

media:content.media:text: Syndication: The Montgomery Advertiser
media:content.media:description: Several pro-democracy groups hold a rally and press conference at the Alabama Statehouse in Montgomery on May 4.

item.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using GOP-drawn congressional map

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
item.description: Tuesday’s primary runoffs in Texas will put President Donald Trump’s endorsement to the test again — the latest step in a mission to punish some incumbent Republicans he has deemed insufficiently loyal

media:content.media:text: Ken Paxton and John Cornyn.
media:content.media:description: Ken Paxton and John Cornyn.

item.title: John Cornyn’s last stand and Democratic fights: What to watch in Texas elections

item.description: A controversial sports event where athletes can use performance-enhancing drugs under medical supervision is raising questions after an unofficial world record swim and renewing debate over the future of fair competition. NBC News' Shaquille Brewster reports.

media:content.media:title: Swimmer 'breaks' world record at billionaire-backed Enhanced Games
media:content.media:description: A controversial sports event where athletes can use performance-enhancing drugs under medical supervision is raising questions after an unofficial world record swim and renewing debate over the future of fair competition. NBC News' Shaquille Brewster reports.

item.title: Swimmer 'breaks' world record at billionaire-backed Enhanced Games

item.dc:creator: Jo Yurcaba
item.description: Conservatives have long argued they want to end transition care for minors, but federal policies have increasingly limited adult access. More restrictions are on the way.

media:content.media:text: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.
media:content.media:description: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.

media:content.media:text: Kacey Garner, a former Postal Service employee, is looking for a job with insurance that will cover her transition care.
media:content.media:description: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.

media:content.media:text: Aleksandra Vaca tried to get hormone therapy from Northwestern Medicine last year but said she was denied because she wasn't 19.
media:content.media:description: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.

media:content.media:text: Daniel Hogan, a University of Florida student, plans to get transition care at a clinic since the university health center stopped providing the treatment.
media:content.media:description: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.

item.title: It’s not just kids: Trump’s crackdown on trans healthcare extends into adulthood

item.description: Starbucks is facing backlash in South Korea over a “Tank Day” marketing campaign that evoked the country’s deadly 1980 military crackdown on pro-democracy protesters. In South Korea, Tank Day commemorates the day the country’s then-military government sent troops and tanks to supress mass rallies for democracy.

media:content.media:title: Starbucks faces backlash in South Korea over ‘Tank Day’ campaign
media:content.media:description: Starbucks is facing backlash in South Korea over a “Tank Day” marketing campaign that evoked the country’s deadly 1980 military crackdown on pro-democracy protesters. In South Korea, Tank Day commemorates the day the country’s then-military government sent troops and tanks to supress mass rallies for democracy.

item.title: Starbucks faces backlash in South Korea over ‘Tank Day’ campaign

item.dc:creator: Saba Hamedy
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Curry Barker, a 26-year-old YouTuber-turned-filmmaker, made his horror film “Obsession” in just 20 days on a mere $750,000 budget

media:content.media:text: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear
media:content.media:description: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear in "Obsession."

item.title: How an indie horror film became a box-office ‘Obsession’

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: Tennessee Titans quarterback Will Levis spent an “exorbitant amount of money” in 2024 to investigate who was behind the leak of his sex tape, his mother said in a podcast interview about how she used that incident to launch a mental health brand.

media:content.media:text: Will Levis.
media:content.media:description: Will Levis of the Tennessee Titans in Nashville in 2025.

item.title: Titans QB Will Levis spent ‘exorbitant amount of money’ to investigate leak of his sex tape, mom says

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
Anastasiia Parafeniuk
item.description: Abandon the Ukrainian capital or risk being hit in a new and intense wave of attacks

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-UKRAINE-RUSSIA-CONFLICT-WAR
media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire at the site of a heavily damaged building following Russian strikes on Kyiv on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: The aftermath in Kyiv following Russian strikes on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire at the site of a heavily damaged building following Russian strikes on Kyiv on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: The destroyed dormitory building of the Starobilsk professional college of the Luhansk Pedagogical University following a drone attack in Starobilsk, Russian-controlled Ukraine, on Friday.
media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire at the site of a heavily damaged building following Russian strikes on Kyiv on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: UKRAINE-RUSSIA-CONFLICT-WAR
media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire at the site of a heavily damaged building following Russian strikes on Kyiv on Sunday.

item.title: Russia pressures U.S., Ukraine’s allies to flee Kyiv, threatening ‘systematic strikes’

item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: Former FBI Director James Comey will go on trial in October over a photo he posted of seashells, provided the Trump administration’s case against him survives forthcoming legal challenges

media:content.media:text: Former FBI Director on "Meet the Press" on May 17, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Former FBI Director on "Meet the Press" on May 17, 2026.

media:content.media:text: instagram post from james comey in may 2025
media:content.media:description: The Justice Department has accused James Comey of threatening President Donald Trump in this Instagram post.

item.title: James Comey’s seashells photo trial set for October

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: A 17-year-old boy was bitten by a shark on Monday afternoon while boating with his father off the coast of Galveston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Galveston,Texas,-,Usa,-,March,11,,2025:,Commercial,Fishing
media:content.media:description: Galveston Marina in southeast Texas in 2025.

item.title: Teen bit by shark while boating with father off Texas coast

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Jane C. Timm
item.description: A three-judge panel on Tuesday blocked a Republican-drawn congressional map in Alabama from going into effect, writing that the district lines “intentionally discriminated based on race in violation of the Constitution.”“We cannot see our way clear to requiring Alabamians to cast their votes in the 2026 elections under a districting plan tainted by intentional race-based discrimination,” the panel of federal judges wrote.

media:content.media:text: Syndication: The Montgomery Advertiser
media:content.media:description: Several pro-democracy groups hold a rally and press conference at the Alabama Statehouse in Montgomery on May 4.

item.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using GOP-drawn congressional map

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Austin Mullen
item.description: North Carolina police have arrested a suspect in the killing of two people during an alleged robbery at a beverage distribution company nearly 20 years ago

media:content.media:text: Police offiicers investigate the scene at a Sun-drop Bottling plant in Concord, N.C., Friday, June 13, 2008 where officials say two people were killed during an apparent robbery.
media:content.media:description: Police officers investigate the scene at a Sun-drop Bottling plant in Concord, N.C., in June 2008, where two people were killed during an alleged robbery.

item.title: Police make arrest in 2008 double killing at a North Carolina beverage distribution company

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Tuesday rejected a Michigan police officer’s attempt to evade an excessive force claim arising from an incident that took place during a protest in the aftermath of the George Floyd killing

media:content.media:text: Law enforcement.
media:content.media:description: A Black Lives Matter protest, in Grand Rapids, Mich., on May 30, 2020.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects cop’s bid to toss excessive force claim from a George Floyd protest

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court threw out a long-shot lawsuit in which Florida sought to sue the states of California and Washington for allegedly allowing people who entered the country illegally to obtain commercial truck driver licenses.

media:content.media:text: Harjinder Singh is escorted onto an airplane by Florida Lt. Gov. Jay Collins and law enforcement on Aug. 21, 2025, in Stockton, Calif.
media:content.media:description: The lawsuit centered on a deadly crash involving truck driver Harjinder Singh, who is pictured being escorted onto an airplane by Florida Lt. Gov. Jay Collins and law enforcement last August in Stockton, California

media:content.media:text: Harjinder Singh
media:content.media:description: The lawsuit centered on a deadly crash involving truck driver Harjinder Singh, who is pictured being escorted onto an airplane by Florida Lt. Gov. Jay Collins and law enforcement last August in Stockton, California

item.title: Supreme Court tosses lawsuit over drivers’ licenses issued to undocumented immigrants

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
Jay Ganglani
item.description: Summers in New Delhi can be brutal, even for Floridians used to the heat

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-INDIA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio poses alongside his wife Jeanette at the Taj Mahal in Agra on May 25, 2026.

media:content.media:text: INDIA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Indian Foreign Minister Subrahmanyam Jaishankar after their meeting in New Delhi on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: INDIA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: Rubio and his wife, Jeanette Rubio, touring the Amber Fort in Jaipur on Monday.

media:content.media:text: INDIA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: Women and children at a residential children’s home waving at Rubio’s convoy in Kolkata on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: INDIA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: Rubio and his wife, Jeanette Rubio, arriving at Jaipur International Airport on Monday.

item.title: ‘I’m from Miami’ but ‘it’s hot’: Rubio tours India as temperatures soar past 100 degrees

item.dc:creator: Stella Kim
Jennifer Jett
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea — The head of Starbucks in South Korea apologized again Tuesday as the company faces sustained public backlash against a marketing campaign widely perceived as mocking those who died for the country’s pro-democracy movement.

media:content.media:text: South Korean ministry to shun Starbucks vouchers in 'Tank Day' campaign backlash
media:content.media:description: An activist smashes Starbucks tumblers and mugs during a protest against Starbucks' "Tank Day" campaign, which was launched on the same day as the anniversary of the May 18 Gwangju uprising, when the then military government sent in troops and tanks to suppress mass rallies for democracy, in Gwangju, South Korea, May 21, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Shinsegae Group Chairman Chung Yong-jin Issues Public Apology For Starbucks Korea's 'Tank Day' Controversy
media:content.media:description: Chung bowed three times during the televised statement as he pleaded for public forgiveness.

media:content.media:text: Protest Against Starbucks Korea In Seoul.
media:content.media:description: Protesters hold placards reading 'Boycott Starbucks' and 'resignation of Chung Yong-jin' in front of the Starbucks Korea headquarters in Seoul on Saturday.

item.title: Starbucks struggles to quell outrage over ‘Tank Day’ campaign that evoked massacre in South Korea

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: The U.S. men’s national team will unveil its roster for the FIFA World Cup on Tuesday, finalizing the squad that will try to capture the U.S. its first title in the world’s biggest soccer tournament

media:content.media:text: U.S. midfielder Christian Pulisic
media:content.media:description: U.S. midfielder Christian Pulisic dribbles during a match against Portugal on March 31 in Atlanta.

item.title: U.S. men’s national team set to reveal World Cup roster

media:content.media:text: Since President Donald Trump re-entered office, his administration has taken several steps to dismantle trans health care for adults.

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:credit: Amazon; Kara Birnbaum / NBC News; Brooklinen
media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

item.title: The 113+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: I found the best Amazon Memorial Day deals so you don’t have to spend time scrolling. Shop great brands like Casper, Ninja, EltaMD and Sony up to 69 percent off.

media:content.media:text: You don’t have to be an Amazon Prime member to shop the retailer’s Memorial Day sale.

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me
